rows.label: qev050302_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Why is my Doll picking up a
signal?! Could it be... Vi Sezha?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0002
rows.name: I told you not to follow me, didn't I?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0003
rows.name:
This is my fight. I don't
want to drag you into it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050302_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell her you came to
help with the fight.

rows.label: qev050302_JNK0020
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev050302_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell her that Vi Sezha asked
you to come rescue her.

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmm? You're not a Larsian, are
you? This is our fight. I can't
possibly drag you into—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0005
rows.name: —Wait! Vi Sezha asked you to come?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0006
rows.name:
Good grief... After I told her
to forget about me... She
really is a helpless girl...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0007
rows.name:
What did you say...?! Vi Sezha asked
you to come all the way here?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0008
rows.name:
I see... After I told her to forget about
me... She really is a helpless girl...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0009
rows.name:
...For the souls of my comrades who died
horribly as sacrificial pawns for the Growth...
I am going to land a blow against them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0010
rows.name:
Sorry for making you waste a
trip. Go back and tell that
girl that Ge Jewhe is dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_JNK0030
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev050302_SEL0031
rows.name:
Angrily tell her to consider
Vi Sezha's feelings.

rows.label: qev050302_JNK0040
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev050302_SEL0041
rows.name:
Calmly reason with her
and talk her down.

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hmph... You don't need to
tell me that. I understand
that girl better than anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0012
rows.name:
...But that doesn't mean I can just
live on ignoring the insults the
Lars have suffered from them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't understand complicated
logic... But there are things more
important than life or bonds![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0014
rows.name:
I cannot just live on ignoring the insults
the Lars have suffered from them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0015
qev050302_MSG0016
rows.name:
...You're right. I will throw away
this bracelet right here. That way,
I will forget about that girl.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0017
rows.name:
Since I'm heading to my death, I can't
afford to have any lingering regrets...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050302_MSG0018
rows.name:
You should head back immediately.
There's an awful lot of Marnuck Scouts
prowling around here. It's dangerous.[ST:wait ]
